comments.author: Majestic_Landscape_5
comments.body: How much capital did you put in to gain $548 in 2 days?

replies.author: Plastic-Scientist739
replies.body: His answer isn't accurate.  $5K locked up for 24 hours each trade.  Count the daily trades and that is how much capital.

comments.author: PenCreative3945
comments.body: How long your strategy is working? What is the balance, drawdown, etc.? I think there are some missing information to any trader who wants to copy your system

replies.author: Aggravating-Ebb-2580
replies.body: I am using this account since Feb, first two months i was just doing testing, all the history is visible on my vantage profile. For the missing information i can say there can be DD in future but i have made a rule if my account reaches more than 5% DD i will close all the trades. As we all know gold is very volatile, i just trade when there is no red news and always go with the trend never against it.

replies.body:
How do I find your account?

I tried searching on Vantage but it can not find you

replies.author: Aggravating-Ebb-2580
replies.body: In copy trading search ‘SilentGrindClub’ you will find it. It shows 3 month return of 45.36%.
